case_title: BO NICOLE CAPENER VS. MTM TECHNOLOGIES INC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPENER, BO NICOLE DBA DESIGNS BY BO (SOLE PROPRIETER) FORMERLY BO NICOLE HEARST AS TO DEFENDANT MTM TECHNOLOGIES INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2011 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CAPENER, BO NICOLE DBA DESIGNS BY BO (SOLE PROPRIETER) FORMERLY BO NICOLE HEARST AS TO DEFENDANT MTM TECHNOLOGIES INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPENER, BO NICOLE DBA DESIGNS BY BO (SOLE PROPRIETER) FORMERLY BO NICOLE HEARST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MTM TECHNOLOGIES INC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,162.24 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,747.24, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-03-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MTM TECHNOLOGIES INC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MTM TECHNOLOGIES INC
